summary: Tested Growth Economy Mining System with updated formula. All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend Mining page verified for Elite cash user showing 100% Speed badge, session controls, and correct mining rate. Backend APIs correctly implement: base_rate=500, PRC_per_user formula, binary network cap (0 refs=800, ≥1 ref=4000), and subscription speed multipliers (cash=100%, PRC=70%, Explorer=demo).

minor.issue: Returns base_mining=550 from DB settings instead of 500 (constant). Minor inconsistency with /api/mining/rate-breakdown which correctly returns 500.

action_items: Consider updating economy_settings in DB to set base_mining=500 for consistency with mining.py constant
critical_code_review_comments: calculate_prc_per_user() correctly implements formula: max(2.5, 5 × (21 - log₂(N)) / 14)
calculate_network_cap() correctly implements binary cap: 0 refs=800, ≥1 ref=4000
Explorer users correctly get is_demo=true, can_collect=false
Frontend Mining.js getMiningSpeedDisplay() correctly shows 100%/70%/Demo badges

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Elite cash user verified with 100% Speed badge)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Growth Economy Mining System fully verified. Formula: PRC_per_user = max(2.5, 5 × (21 - log₂(N)) / 14), Base=500 PRC/day. Network cap is binary: 0 refs=800, ≥1 ref=4000. Speed multipliers: Elite cash=100%, Elite PRC=70%, Explorer=demo (can't collect). Frontend Mining page shows correct speed badges and mining controls.

features_tested.GET /api/mining/rate-breakdown/{uid}: PASS - Returns base_rate=500, correct formula, network_cap, boost_multiplier
features_tested.GET /api/mining/status/{uid}: PASS - Returns session info, mining_rate, is_demo for Explorer
features_tested.POST /api/mining/start/{uid}: PASS - Starts session for Elite users
features_tested.POST /api/mining/collect/{uid}: PASS - Collects PRC and auto-starts new session
features_tested.GET /api/growth/mining-speed/{uid}: PASS - Returns mining speed data (note: base_mining from DB)
features_tested.GET /api/growth/network-stats/{uid}: PASS - Returns network size, cap, direct referrals
features_tested.Frontend Mining page (Elite cash): PASS - Shows 100% Speed badge, session controls, collect button
